title: genista subsericans
intro: Genista subsericans, also known as the broom thorn or Italian broom, is a species of flowering plant in the legume family, Fabaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits associated with Genista subsericans include reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting cardiovascular well-being. The plant can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
